{{Infobox character
| name = Storm Sage
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Storm Sage, cult leaders
| abilities = spatial transfer
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

''See also: [[Storm Sage Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Storm [[Sage]] is a powerful figure associated with the [[Stormcaller]] sect. This individual is known for having used [[spatial transfer]] abilities during their lifetime and has been described as being quite skilled in that area. In combat, the Storm [[Sage]] has demonstrated significant power, such as riding a [[Forged lightning dragon]] and catching a heavy hammer with hands crackling with lightning. The [[Sage]]'s temperament can shift rapidly from eager curiosity to manic laughter and intense, blind fury. Following their death, the Storm [[Sage]]'s [[Remnant]] remains, characterized by a voice that sounds like snapping thunder and crackling lightning. This [[Remnant]] expresses a sense of defiance toward a great power, viewing such rebellion as a form of tribute. The Storm [[Sage]] is also linked to the destruction of people and the torture of an individual named [[Ziel]].}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Storm Sage]] is a powerful figure.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Storm Sage]] is a source of lightning madra scales.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15">''Wintersteel'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Storm Sage]] is one of the cult leaders who arrived.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24">''Reaper'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Storm Sage]] destroyed [[Ziel]]'s people and tortured him.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|During a fierce battle, the Storm [[Sage]] fought while mounted upon a [[Forged lightning dragon]]. Although he possessed great skill in [[spatial transfer]] during his lifetime, his ability to regenerate was slow during the conflict. As the fight progressed, he used hands crackling with lightning to catch [[Ziel]]'s hammer. Ultimately, [[Yerin]] devoured power from the Storm [[Sage]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Storm Sage]] is fighting in a battle.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15">''Waybound'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Storm Sage]] rides on the back of a [[Forged lightning dragon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Storm Sage]]'s regeneration was slow.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c16">''Waybound'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Storm Sage]] caught [[Ziel]]'s hammer with lightning-crackling hands.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] devoured power from the [[Storm Sage]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18">''Waybound'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Storm Sage]] was skilled in [[spatial transfer]] when he was alive.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
